description: Use this API to change the name of the specified FACTS device. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = mbidfacts(fd, fdnew)

parameters.name: fd
parameters.description: Quoted name of the facts device for which the facts device name is to be changed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: fdnew
parameters.description: Quoted new name to be assigned to the facts device; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
